title: Armor Effect
description: Gives an effect when putting on a certain armor or item
body:
# Armor Effect
Gives an effect when putting on a certain armor or item

![Performance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7qv93UCj/images/b16c7a0deb6b7d576a878ddf91c946a4a5f4ab15.png)
ㅤ
### Armors and effects

- **Leather armor set** give effect **speed**
- **Chainmail armor set** give effect **resistance**
- **Iron armor set** give effect **strength**
- **Golden armor set** give effect **regeneration**
- **Diamond armor set** give effect **luck**
- **Netherite armor set** give effect **fire resistance**

### Items and effects

- **Carved pumpkin** give effect **blindness**
- **Jack o lantern** give effect **glowing**
- **Skeleton skull** give effect **weakness**
- **Wither skull** give effect **wither**
- **Zombie head** give effect **hunger**
- **Piglin head** give effect **hero of the village**
- **Dragon head** give effect **levitation**
- **Observer** give effect **night vision**
